event_description: I have no reliable knowledge of Weis Markets, Inc. (WMK) ever announcing an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance disclosure, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure tied to financial-reporting issues. Weis Markets is a regional Pennsylvania-based grocery chain, and nothing in my training data points to such an event for this company.
